key_finding: Simulation identifies 4 Sugar Shack products (Nerds, Laffy Taffy, Fun Dip, Fizzy Lifting Drinks) as priority reassignment candidates with both distance reduction potential (32-79%) and margin headroom. A business-sense guardrail prevents recommending moves for already high-margin, low-distance-gain products. Only Kazookles (7.69% margin) is flagged High Risk.
